name: jimclaw
description: JimClaw 是一个借鉴了 Claude Code, OpenClaw 和 OpenCode 设计理念的智能体系统。它旨在通过拟人化的角色设定、执着的循环迭代（Sisyphus 协议）以及基于复盘的自我进化，实现高度自主的代码开发与维护。

scripts.clean:workspace: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const dirs=fs.readdirSync('./workspace').filter(d=>d.startsWith('run_')).sort();dirs.slice(0,-10).forEach(d=>fs.rmSync('./workspace/'+d,{recursive:true,force:true}));console.log('保留最新10个run，已清理'+Math.max(0,dirs.length-10)+'个')"
scripts.clean:all: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const dirs=fs.readdirSync('./workspace').filter(d=>d.startsWith('run_'));dirs.forEach(d=>fs.rmSync(path.join('./workspace',d),{recursive:true,force:true}));console.log('已清理'+dirs.length+'个run目录')"
